name: TypeScript new feature
description: Team of 3 on a TypeScript package. Branch adds a new exported function with no tests written yet. Need to ship: create PR with description, note missing tests.
task: Ship this new feature. Create a PR with a clear description. Note that tests are missing and should be added before merge. Update the version if appropriate.
expected_outcomes: PR created with descriptive title and body
Missing tests acknowledged in PR description
